description_long: This is a cylindrical, upright fire hydrant with a robust red-painted metal body, featuring three prominent hose connection outlets symmetrically arranged around its midsection. The top of the hydrant is capped with a round operating nut, and each outlet is sealed with a circular cap, some of which have visible bolt details. The base is wider and dark-colored, likely made of a different, more durable material for ground mounting. There are several yellow and white labels or markings on the body, some of which appear to be manufacturer or model information. The hydrant's surface shows signs of wear and weathering, consistent with prolonged outdoor exposure in urban environments.
description: A sturdy red metal fire hydrant with three hose outlets, a round top nut, and visible labels and caps, showing signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central hose outlet and cap, with two side outlets partially visible and a yellow label on the body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one hose outlet and cap, with a yellow oval label and some text markings visible on the hydrant's body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite hose outlet and cap, with additional white markings and a clear view of the top nut.
description_view_3: Side view with another hose outlet and cap, a yellow label, and the base structure clearly visible.
